name: Dev Container Development Certificates
description: Enables trusted HTTPS in Dev Containers by preparing certificate trust infrastructure and installing companion VS Code extensions that automatically generate, trust, and transfer ASP.NET and Aspire compatible development certificates from the host machine. Add to your devcontainer.json: "features": { "ghcr.io/dnegstad/devcontainer-dev-certs/devcontainer-dev-certs": {} }

trustNss.description: Install NSS tools (certutil) for Chromium/Firefox certificate trust inside the container

sslCertDirs.description: Colon-separated system CA certificate directories to include in SSL_CERT_DIR alongside the dev-certs trust directory. Override this if your base image uses non-standard paths.

generateDotNetCert.description: Auto-generate the ASP.NET Core / Aspire compatible HTTPS development certificate. Set to false to skip generation (for example when only syncing user-provided certificates).

syncUserCertificates.description: Allow the host extension to sync user-provided certificates (configured via the devcontainerDevCerts.userCertificates VS Code setting) into this container.

extraCertDestinations.description: Comma-separated additional destinations to write cert artifacts to. Each entry: <abs-path>[=<format>] where format is pem|key|pem-bundle|pfx|all (defaults to all). Trailing / means directory target; ${name} may be used in a filename. Example: /etc/nginx/certs/=pem,/var/myapp/.
